Operation 'calculateMultisimulation' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary 'Calculate Loan or Leasing Product' is vague about the multi-simulation capability and doesn't clearly indicate the comparative analysis aspect. Description lacks clarity about what outputs are returned (quotation details, payment calculations) and doesn't clarify that this is a stateless calculation operation. Enhanced version specifies the multi-simulation capability upfront, details expected outputs (monthly payments, total costs, terms), and clarifies no side effects occur. This improves AI agent understanding of when to use this operation and what to expect from the response.

data.current_description: Calculate the price for the specified product and financial details. Supports multiple quotes in a single request for comparing different financing options.
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate multi-simulation loan and leasing quotes
data.description_suggestion: Calculate financing quotes for loan and leasing products based on vehicle details and financial parameters. Supports multiple simultaneous simulations in a single request to enable comparison of different financing options. Returns detailed quotation results including monthly payments, total costs, and product-specific terms. No persistent state changes occur - results are calculated and returned without storing data.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Calculate Loan or Leasing Product' is vague about the multi-simulation capability and doesn't clearly indicate the comparative analysis aspect. Description lacks clarity about what outputs are returned (quotation details, payment calculations) and doesn't clarify that this is a stateless calculation operation. Enhanced version specifies the multi-simulation capability upfront, details expected outputs (monthly payments, total costs, terms), and clarifies no side effects occur. This improves AI agent understanding of when to use this operation and what to expect from the response.

data.current_description: Calculate the price for the specified product and financial details. Supports multiple quotes in a single request for comparing different financing options.
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate multi-simulation loan and leasing quotes
data.description_suggestion: Calculate financing quotes for loan and leasing products based on vehicle details and financial parameters. Supports multiple simultaneous simulations in a single request to enable comparison of different financing options. Returns detailed quotation results including monthly payments, total costs, and product-specific terms. No persistent state changes occur - results are calculated and returned without storing data.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Calculate Loan or Leasing Product' is vague about the multi-simulation capability and doesn't clearly indicate the comparative analysis aspect. Description lacks clarity about what outputs are returned (quotation details, payment calculations) and doesn't clarify that this is a stateless calculation operation. Enhanced version specifies the multi-simulation capability upfront, details expected outputs (monthly payments, total costs, terms), and clarifies the operation's stateless nature. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope, when to use it for comparison scenarios, and what data to expect in responses.

message: Semantic analysis completed: 3 operations analyzed, 1 quality issues found
